steps.title: Identify when the Round Table enters the written record
steps.content: The passage establishes that the Round Table appears in Roman de Brut (1155) but in nothing written before that date. This pinpoints the documented origin of the Round Table in the literary tradition.

steps.title: Infer what all later references must trace back to
steps.content:
Any Arthurian legend written after 1155 that mentions the Round Table must be descended from Roman de Brut, since that's where the Round Table first appears in writing.

The other choices either contradict the passage's relationships or introduce unsupported claims.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
